lint.command: echo "Checkstyle remains advisory in this review mission; treat the existing baseline as known debt and capture findings in docs/code-review/test-ci-governance.md."

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the review-only mission bootstrap contract: either pre-seed required `.factory/` review scaffolding before workers start or explicitly allow those bootstrap files in the architecture/foundation feature scope so docs-only write boundaries do not conflict with mission setup needs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The reviewed `architecture-overview-review` commit `b01b2dd1a5c2ef773a0986b9d1dc70d299d25c0b` added `.factory/init.sh`, `.factory/services.yaml`, `.factory/library/review-playbook.md`, `.factory/library/user-testing.md`, and `.factory/skills/review-worker/SKILL.md` in addition to the requested docs, indicating mission bootstrap work spilled into a feature-level deliverable.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a first-class fallback path for Task fan-out failures: when review subagents cannot start because of model-alias/bootstrap errors, perform manual evidence review, write the per-feature review JSON artifacts directly, and continue synthesis while recording the environment issue.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All four `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` Task invocations in this run failed with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-xhigh`, so the validator had to inspect commits/handoffs directly and author `.factory/validation/foundation-review/scrutiny/reviews/*.json` manually to complete the milestone review.
